title: Marketplace Manager - Ecom Express - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Ecom Express - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Ecom Express invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!
